goals.description: Every component must be executable and produce real output
goals.verification: Owner can run command and see result

goals.description: Every PASS must have evidence, every FAIL must be honest
goals.verification: Inquisition audit finds no fake green

goals.goal: Receipts and reports for every action
goals.description: Every significant action creates JSON receipt and report
HTML dashboards read from JSON reports, not static text
All work inside IMPERIUM_TEST_VERSION, no changes to main repo
Clear commands, paths, checklists for Owner review
